footer.tagline: Designed and engineered for modern everyday carry.

share.toastCopyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically. Long-press the URL bar.
share.shareTagline: Built for the way you carry. — Computex Systems

hero.tagline: Built for the way you carry.
hero.subline: Modern everyday backpacks engineered for durability, designed without compromise.

brandStory.lead: We design for what everyday life actually needs.
brandStory.p1: This backpack brings together protection, lightness, and simplicity—built with a dedicated laptop compartment, a water-repellent exterior, and a structure refined through real use.
brandStory.p2: Not overly technical, not overly minimal. Just balanced.
brandStory.p3: We believe a backpack should feel natural to carry, effortless to use, and ready for the rhythm of daily life—from commuting to movement in between.

durability.title: Durability
durability.summary: Reinforced seams and weather-resistant fabric, built to outlast your commute.

reinforcedStitching.title: Reinforced Stitching
reinforcedStitching.description: Bar-tacked stress points and double-row lockstitches anchor every strap and seam to the body, holding the bag intact through years of heavy loads and hard pulls.

machineWashable.title: Machine Washable
machineWashable.description: Toss it in the wash. Colorfast dyes, rust-proof hardware, and reinforced edges hold their shape and tone across dozens of cycles — fresh-looking year after year.

design.title: Design
design.summary: Considered details, clean silhouettes — a bag that earns its place every day.

laptopCompartment.title: Reinforced Laptop Compartment
laptopCompartment.description: A purpose-built suspended sleeve cradles your laptop in dense foam, lifted clear of the bag floor so ground impacts dissipate before reaching your device.

breathableStraps.title: Super-Breathable Straps & Padding
breathableStraps.description: Contoured shoulder straps and air-channeled mesh back padding distribute weight evenly and vent body heat, keeping long carries cool, balanced, and effortless.

quality.title: Quality
quality.summary: Tested materials and careful assembly. Every panel held to the same standard.

shockproofFoam.title: Shockproof Foam Armor
shockproofFoam.description: Closed-cell foam armor lines the chassis, absorbing impact energy before it reaches your gear — bumps, drops, and jostled commutes leave the contents undisturbed.

waterResistant.title: Water-Resistant Material
waterResistant.description: A high-density woven shell with hydrophobic coating beads water on contact, shedding rain and unexpected splashes so the essentials inside stay completely dry.

shop.heading: Choose your region
shop.subheading: We'll route you to the local distributor or retail platform that ships to your region.

regionTagline.TW: Available through our Taiwan retail partners.
regionTagline.SZ: Local pickup and delivery across Eswatini.
regionTagline.ZA: Shipping nationwide via our South African distributor.
regionTagline.US: Available on our United States e-commerce partner.
